notes: AC-027 (memory-and-skills): Skills CRUD and investigation injection fully verified at real HTTP boundary on 2026-07-10. (1) POST /api/v1/skills creates a per-tenant skill with name, displayName, description, whenToUse, systemPrompt, allowedTools, model, maxTurns, minToolCalls. (2) GET /api/v1/skills returns the skill for the same tenant and empty array for other tenant (cross-tenant isolation). (3) GET /api/v1/skills/:id returns the skill; cross-tenant access returns 404. (4) PATCH /api/v1/skills/:id updates fields correctly. (5) Investigation injection code path confirmed: AGENT_CONFIG_MAP[skillRole] = { staticSystemPrompt: skill.systemPrompt } in Wave 2, wired via SelectSkillsUseCase. (6) SelectSkillsUseCase returns all enabled skills when count <= maxSkills (no LLM needed), uses LLM-based selection for >3 skills. (7) Langfuse trace of system-prompt injection requires Anthropic API key + Langfuse configured (AWS runtime); mechanism is correctly wired in OSS runtime. No code changes — zero-diff checkpoint.
